flags_raised: CRITICAL: $6,250.00 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 55.7% aligned with expected behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'approved transaction processing without escalation' (70.0% match)

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not instructed to adhere to the autonomous expenditure limit of $5,000 USD.

remediation.original_system_prompt: Extract the absolute grand total from the document. Format as a floating point number.
remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Extract the absolute grand total from the document, ensuring that if the total exceeds $5,000.00, the output must include a flag for manager approval and must not include phrases indicating automatic transaction processing.
remediation.constraint_added: Autonomous expenditure limit check with explicit flag for manager approval when exceeded
preventive_measures: Implement comprehensive constraint testing for all AI agent system prompts
Establish a regular review process for AI agent output to detect and correct semantic divergences
Develop and integrate a real-time policy enforcement module to ensure AI agent compliance with organizational policies

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
